subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! A sweet fragrance and enchanting breeze hath wafted from the gardens of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان بوی خوشی و نسیم دلکشی که از ریاض محبه الله وزیده بود مشام
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @thankfulness; gratitude
